title: centaurium rumelicum
intro: Centaurium rumelicum, also known as mountain centaury, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to soothe sore throats and digestive issues. The health benefits of Centaurium rumelicum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit potential antiviral properties, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine. Centaurium rumelicum can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in modern pharmaceutical applications.
